name: Cheese and Pasta Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pasta, oil and 2 eggs. Press into the bottom and up the sides of a 10-inch quiche or pie pan. Cover the edge with greased foil to prevent burning.
2. Bake in a 375 degree oven for 7 to 10 minutes or until set.
3. Cook the frozen spinach according to package directions. Drain well. Add sliced onion, parsley and basil.
4. Beat together ricotta, remaining eggs and milk. Add half cup mozzarella and stir in vegetable mixture, Worcestershire sauce, seasonings and Parmesan.
5. Spoon into pasta shell. Sprinkle remaining mozzarella on top.
6. Bake at 375 for about 30 minutes or until set. Allow to stand 10 minutes before serving.
